no: NE Female Elf Thief (Assassin).Install Silver Star before Detective’s Guild of Athkatla. REINSTALL BUG: portraits%ee_file% unresolved on reinstall — same issue as Saradas and BTL. First install succeeds.

cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: This mod adds an elven neutral evil assassin who can first join the party in Irenicus' lovely underground hole. Silver Star is partially insane and chronically poisoned. She has crude and cruel dialogues, and banters with NPCs in SoA, but not in ToB.

co.n: Silver Star NPC Mod for BGII:SoA
co.tp2n: Silver Star NPC Mod for BGII:SoA
